title: Gold gains amid speculation the Fed may pause
section_path: Gold gains amid speculation the Fed may pause
section_path_text: Gold gains amid speculation the Fed may pause
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A weak macro-economic backdrop weighed on sentiment. This was offset by hopes that central banks may be done raising rates and ongoing supply side issues. Gold rallied amid speculation the Federal Reserve may pause its interest rate hikes.
